productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Schemerhorn Dark Brown Shoe
description: These Schemerhorn oxfords from rockport are both well crafted and comfortable and therefore ideal for  formal wear. This pair of classy footwear is created with Dynamic Suspension technology, ensuring maximum comfort. These shoes come in smart environment friendly packaging which is 100% recycled.Upper Full-grain leather upper with tonal stitching and moc toe for an office-ready appearance jersey lining is a soft, knitted fabric that feels great against the foot Padded collar and tongue help prevent lace bruising and blisters Traditional central lacing for a comfortable customised Fit Midsole DMX air chamber on bottom of footbed provides dynamic air cushioning and sensation Dynamic Suspension technology at the bottom of the footbed ensuring maximum comfort with the slightest movement Outsole PU outsole provides durable shock absorption, helping reduce foot fatigue shoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineKeep shoes away from sunlight
